description: Create an active 'Buy X Get Y' style promotion named 'Drone Power Bundle' that provides a 50% discount on the 'Anker PowerCore 26800' (SKU: ANKER-PC26800) when a 'DJI Mini 3 Pro' (SKU: DJI-MINI3) is in the cart. The discount must apply specifically to the Anker PowerCore 26800 item rather than the entire order subtotal.
